topics.title: Radio Show Production Conflict
topics.summary: The studio experiences internal tension as the host and producers argue over the decision to play a specific comedy bit on a wrap-up show.

topics.title: Production Decisions and Guest Interview
topics.summary: The studio discusses internal production choices regarding comedy bits, the management of staff, and a segment featuring a guest who becomes physically ill during a trivia game.

topics.title: Radio Production and Personal Relationships
topics.summary: The studio discussion covers the challenges of producing comedy bits, the health of film critic Roger Ebert, and personal anecdotes regarding past dating habits.

topics.title: American Idol and Adult Content Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding the production of American Idol, personal experiences with adult films, and humorous interactions involving a caller.

topics.title: Alec Baldwin Phone Tapes
topics.summary: The studio plays a series of recordings featuring Alec Baldwin's angry outbursts and discusses a caller who claimed she was the ideal woman for him.

topics.title: Celebrity Rumors and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including celebrity rumors regarding Rosie O'Donnell, a bizarre recording of an alien-themed guest named Riley, and the logistics of contacting Alec Baldwin.

topics.title: Bubba's Upcoming Wrestling Match
topics.summary: The studio discusses Bubba's upcoming appearance in a professional wrestling house show, the logistics of his performance with Hulk Hogan, and personal anecdotes regarding celebrity relationships and concert experiences.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Comedy Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion on the mechanics of professional wrestling, an analysis of Alec Baldwin’s public appearance following a controversial incident, and a humorous anecdote about Don Rickles and Frank Sinatra.

topics.title: Stone Cold Steve Austin's Film Career
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Stone Cold Steve Austin regarding his role in the action film "The Condemned," his professional relationship with Vince McMahon, and his transition from wrestling to acting.

topics.title: Steve Austin Promotes The Condemned
topics.summary: The studio features Steve Austin discussing his transition from wrestling to acting, the production of his film "The Condemned," and his professional relationship with Vince McMahon.

topics.title: Union Square Promotion and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The studio coordinates a promotional tour featuring an ice cream truck converted into a peep show, while the host interviews various guests regarding their personal lives, health issues, and upcoming appearances.

topics.title: Pop Culture and American Idol Performances
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news, personal anecdotes regarding physical intimacy, a tragic lottery winner story, and various performances from the American Idol competition.

topics.title: Military Cover-ups and War Narratives
topics.summary: The studio examines reports of military cover-ups regarding Pat Tillman’s death and Jessica Lynch’s capture to maintain a heroic public image for the war effort.

topics.title: Riley Martin's Urine Jug
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange regarding Riley Martin's use of a gallon jug for urination and his subsequent interactions with a reporter in a parking garage.

topics.title: Host and Guest Dispute Over Salary and Conduct
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange regarding contract negotiations, personal conduct, and the logistics of a guest's upcoming appearance.
